config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters deeply, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because that is exactly how abuse and injustice can grow. In my view, a healthy society is built by protecting personal dignity, freedom, and due process first, then balancing those with the common good when necessary. From my own perspective, I am wary of any argument that gives society too much power over the individual, because it can easily be used to silence minorities or justify unfair treatment.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, pengalaman sejarah kami justru menunjukkan bahwa ketika “kepentingan umum” diberi kuasa terlalu besar, hak minoritas dan kebebasan sipil sering jadi korban, entah lewat sensor, diskriminasi, atau penyalahgunaan wewenang. Itu tidak berarti hak individu absolut tanpa batas, tetapi beban pembuktiannya harus sangat kuat sebelum negara atau masyarakat boleh membatasi hak seseorang. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang paling serius melindungi martabat dan kebebasan tiap orang sambil mencari kompromi yang benar-benar perlu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over individual rights, because that is too easy to abuse. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how appeals to “public order” or “the common good” can be used to silence criticism, punish minorities, or excuse unfair treatment, so I do not trust that principle when it is stated too broadly. Society does matter, and there are real cases where individual freedom must be limited, but those limits should be narrow, necessary, and clearly justified by law. A healthy society protects people first and then asks them to contribute to the common good, not the other way around.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dijadikan alasan utama, hasilnya sering berupa sensor, diskriminasi, dan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan terhadap kelompok kecil atau tidak populer. Poin bahwa ada situasi tertentu di mana hak bisa dibatasi memang benar, tetapi itu harus menjadi pengecualian yang sangat sempit, bukan prinsip dasar. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang kuat justru dibangun dengan melindungi martabat dan kebebasan individu terlebih dahulu, lalu menyeimbangkannya dengan kebutuhan kolektif secara hati-hati.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should never be treated as a blank check to override individual rights. From my perspective as someone from Indonesia, I have seen how appeals to order, harmony, or the common good can be used to pressure people into silence, especially minorities or those with unpopular views. Society does matter, but it is healthier when rights are the starting point and any limits are narrow, lawful, and truly necessary. If we reverse that order, it becomes too easy to excuse injustice in the name of the majority.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena di Amerika kami terlalu sering melihat alasan “demi masyarakat” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi, dan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Poin bahwa ada keadaan darurat atau pembatasan yang benar-benar perlu memang masuk akal, tetapi itu pengecualian yang harus dibuktikan sangat ketat, bukan asumsi awal. Bagi saya, hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu fondasi agar masyarakat tetap adil dan tidak menindas kelompok yang tidak populer. Jika urutannya dibalik, terlalu mudah bagi mayoritas untuk menyebut ketidakadilan sebagai kebaikan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
